name: partial-suite-results-resume
title: Persist partial suite results and resume failed jobs
description: Persist partial failed-suite results into the leaderboard, keep failed jobs across restarts, and allow resume/delete actions from the web UI.
creator: gary
notes: Implemented persistent web job storage in .state/web_jobs.json, same-run resume that skips completed model/problem pairs, delete-job cleanup that rebuilds the leaderboard, and UI actions for continue/delete. Verified with PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m unittest tests.test_webapp and tests.test_core.
